summary: Inventory management app with Excel upload/download functionality. Import uses item ID as the fixed key so edited data from Excel updates existing records in the app. Button labels changed from 'Impor Excel'/'Ekspor Excel' to 'Unggah'/'Unduh'.
architectural_notes: Excel import uses item ID as the canonical unique key; all other fields are updated based on Excel data
known_issues: Edited data in Excel does not reflect in app upon re-import (to be fixed via ID-based matching)

existing_features.title: When importing an Excel file in the Inventory page, use the item ID (ID Barang) as the stable key: if a row's ID matches an existing item, update that item's other fields (name, price, stock, etc.) with the values from Excel instead of skipping or duplicating it. Only create a new item if the ID does not match any existing record.
On the Inventory page, rename the 'Impor Excel' button label to 'Unggah' and the 'Ekspor Excel' button label to 'Unduh'.

new_feature_requests.summary: Use item ID as fixed key when importing Excel so edited fields update existing records in the app
Rename import/export Excel buttons to 'Unggah' and 'Unduh'
